# arena_drone (Resource)

Manages a drone resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arena_drone" "ugv_0" {
  name       = "ugv-0"
  kind       = "sbc"
  profile_id = "ugv-profile-id" // the spec values are then used from this drone profile
}

resource "arena_drone" "ugv_special" {
  name        = "ugv-rpi-5"
  kind        = "sbc"
  description = "ugv with rpi-5 as controller"
  spec = {
    arch         = "arm64"
    memory_in_gb = 8

    compute = {
      "4xA76" = 2.4,
      "total" = 9.6,
    }

    networks = {
      "wifi" = {
        kind      = "wifi-5"
        max_range = 10
        bandwidth = 50
      }
    }

    storage = {
      "sd-card" = {
        kind       = "micro-sd"
        capacity   = 118
        mount_path = "/"
        dev_path   = "/dev/mmcblk0p2"
      }
    }

    power = {
      capacity = "20000 mAh"
      output   = "5V 3A / 9V 2.3A"
    }

    details = {
      memory = "LPDDR4X",
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the basis

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the basis
- `inactive` (Boolean) whether the drone is inactive
- `kind` (String) drone kind
- `links` (String) device interface links
- `profile_id` (String) id of drone profile
- `spec` (Attributes) drone device specification (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))
- `swarm_id` (String) id of swarm the drone belongs to

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the basis was created
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the basis
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when the basis was last updated
- `version` (Number) The version of the basis

<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Required:

- `arch` (String) CPU architecture (e.g. amd64, arm64)
- `memory_in_gb` (Number) memory in GB

Optional:

- `compute` (Map of Number) map of core to frequency
- `details` (Map of String) any other details
- `gpu` (Map of Number) GPU parameters
- `model` (Map of String) model parameters
- `networks` (Attributes Map) network interfaces (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--networks))
- `npu` (Map of Number) NPU parameters
- `power` (Map of String) power related details
- `storage` (Attributes Map) map of local storage options (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--storage))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.networks`

Optional:

- `bandwidth` (Number) network bandwidth in mbps at mid distance from max
- `kind` (String) kind of network interface radio/wifi5 etc
- `mac` (String) MAC address
- `max_range` (Number) maximum range in meters
- `power_usage` (Number) power usage in milli watts


<a id="nestedatt--spec--storage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.storage`

Required:

- `capacity` (Number) storage capacity in GB
- `mount_path` (String) filesystem mount path of this disk

Optional:

- `dev_path` (String) path under /dev tree
- `guid` (String) disk guid
- `kind` (String) kind of storage e.g. ssd, hdd, nvme, flash, sd-card
